TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ibrahim Mohamed Solih Ibrahim Mohamed Solih (ryax sa 1 na byacing tay 3 squ kawas na 1962 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1962) mrhuw Maldives ta' misuw hya' ga Ibrahim Mohamed Solih, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Ibrahim Mohamed Solih minkahul sa Hinnavaru na Maldives. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1962 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: iő≤rańßim mońßame* s~…ēolińß iő≤rańßim mońßame* s~…ēolińß (rjax s~…ēa * na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēuw ), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw mal*i*es~…ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a iő≤rańßim mońßame* s~…ēolińß, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral iő≤rańßim mońßame* s~…ēolińß minkańßul s~…ēa ńßinna*aru na mal*i*es~…ē. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
